---
title: "Programming on the VLAI"
subtitle: "A minimal website MVP"
---

Welcome to the first draft of this Quarto website. This page is intentionally small and uses placeholder content so the structure can be reviewed before adding real material.

## Purpose

This site will become a home for course notes, examples, and supporting resources. For now, the MVP has two pages:

- an overview page for the project direction
- a course page for dummy learning content

## What goes here

Use this page for the high-level narrative: who the site is for, what learners will do, and how the material is organized.

## Draft sections

| Section   | Placeholder focus                |
|-----------|----------------------------------|
| Overview  | Course context and objectives    |
| Course    | Modules, readings, and exercises |
| Resources | Links, templates, and examples   |
